text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...That's it? I got a fan letter!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This is proof I've gotten even stronger!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: When I was young, my papa always used to say...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A wrestler is only as strong as the number of fans
they have!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a wrestler, but now I know exactly what he
meant!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: When I read fan letters, it sets my spirit on fire!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All the voices cheering me on fuel the flames in
my burning soul!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's the true strength my papa told me about!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, my fans and I will continue
gettin' stronger and stronger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems like the fan letter has stoked her passion.
